scripts.android:live:mac: sh -c 'export JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home"; export PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH"; CAP_SERVER_URL=http://10.0.2.2:5173 npx cap run android'
scripts.android:prod: powershell -Command "Copy-Item index.html dist\index.html -Force; Remove-Item Env:CAP_SERVER_URL -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npx cap sync android; npx cap run android"
scripts.android:prod:mac: sh -c 'export JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home"; export PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH"; cp index.html dist/index.html; unset CAP_SERVER_URL; npx cap sync android; npx cap run android'
scripts.ip: sh -c 'ipconfig getifaddr en0 || ipconfig getifaddr en1'
scripts.ios:prod: sh -c 'cp index.html dist/index.html && unset CAP_SERVER_URL && npx cap sync ios && npx cap run ios'
